scope: Profile APK 30-minute idle soak on a real server-wide selected-agent page, covering request counts, memory, wake locks, gfxinfo, and logcat stability.

mobile_app.commit: docs: record profile scrolled desktop sync smoke

source.head: 7e436f7e
source.commit: fix: order mobile native transcript pages by record time

acceptance_notes: The app was opened on a real server-wide selected-agent page backed by disposable test_ccb2 projects.
During the 1800-second untouched idle audit window, the request proxy observed zero total requests and zero conversation or terminal-history requests.
After the audit window, the test performed exactly one explicit selected-agent refresh, visible in the final proxy count.
Device metrics showed stable memory, no app fatal/ANR/OOM markers, no skipped-frame logcat markers, and no wake locks.
This closes the profile-mode 30-minute idle request-rate/power soak smoke, but not release-mode power or release harness acceptance.
